name: Melrose Golf Club
about: Melrose Golf Club is a members-only golf simulator venue located in Nashville, TN. It features TrackMan™ simulators, a putting green, pool table, darts, and a lounge area with large screens for sports viewing. The club is designed to be a relaxed, local-focused social hub with a retro Palm Springs vibe, emphasizing fun and community. Membership is required, with one-time joining fees and monthly or annual dues.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan™ simulators for accurate data
Relaxed, social atmosphere with retro design
No guest fees for friends and family
Unlimited access to golf sims with membership

food_and_drink.notes: Members can bring their own food or order in from outside vendors
BYOB policy allows members to bring their own alcohol

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, members are expected to bring their own golf equipment to use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, members can bring their own food and alcohol. The venue operates on a BYOB (bring your own booze) policy.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified on the website, but typical simulator sessions range from 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Melrose Golf Club is described as a family-friendly venue where kids are welcome.
